title: Claude Code Guide: From First Session to Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: The definitive zero-to-hero guide for Claude Code — Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Master CLAUDE.md, MCP integrations, custom skills, hooks, worktrees, and agent teams across 11 practitioner-driven chapters.

chapters.title: Introduction & Getting Started
chapters.description: Learn how Claude Code's agentic loop works, install on macOS/Linux/Windows, explore the core tool set, and complete your first AI-assisted coding session.

chapters.title: Project Context & Memory
chapters.description: Master the CLAUDE.md hierarchy, auto-memory system, path-specific rules, and context window management to get dramatically better results from Claude Code.

chapters.title: Models, Cost Economics & Permissions
chapters.description: Choose between Sonnet, Opus, and Haiku for cost-effective AI coding. Configure effort levels, track spending, and set up the deny/ask/allow permission system.

chapters.title: Environment Sandboxing & Customization
chapters.description: Configure Claude Code's four-tier settings hierarchy, enable macOS Seatbelt or Linux sandbox isolation, and customize the terminal status line.

chapters.title: Remote Control & Headless Automation
chapters.description: Run Claude Code from any device via remote control, automate with headless mode in CI/CD pipelines, and schedule recurring tasks with cron.

chapters.title: Model Context Protocol
chapters.description: Connect Claude Code to external tools — databases, APIs, ticketing systems — using the Model Context Protocol with stdio, HTTP, and OAuth authentication.

chapters.title: Custom Skills
chapters.description: Build reusable SKILL.md files that encode team conventions as slash commands or auto-invoked capabilities, with tool restrictions and subagent isolation.

chapters.title: Hooks & Lifecycle Automation
chapters.description: Automate quality enforcement with 18 lifecycle events — lint before commits, block dangerous commands, and log every tool invocation to an audit system.

chapters.title: Git Worktrees & Subagent Delegation
chapters.description: Parallelize development across isolated git worktree branches using built-in and custom subagents with AGENT.md persona definitions.

chapters.title: Agent Teams & Advanced Orchestration
chapters.description: Coordinate multiple Claude Code instances on shared task lists with dependency tracking and peer-to-peer communication (research preview).

chapters.title: Security & Enterprise Administration
chapters.description: Deploy Claude Code at organizational scale with managed settings, permission governance, sandbox enforcement, and OpenTelemetry audit compliance.
